title: Agaric
body:
This mod ads 3 new features:

The Sporder: a funky lil guy that can be tamed by shift clicking, ridden by clicking and once tamed, made to sit by shift clicking, it will not follow you. Also when jumping on the mob Jump boost is applyied. Can be found in lush caves.

Micelyte: is a new block that serves no purpose at the moment, other than being used to make Micelyte on a stick



Micelyte on a stick: used to control the Sporder.

Recipes:

Micelyte








![Micelyte](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/608688021dd9758bf5d524ad2f7aa995d58ec222.png)

Micelyte on a stick






![Micelyte on a stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29807147e43368d592f039e35f19ffbcee775db0.png)


Thank you to JadenXGamer and Jaiz15 for help!!!
